requirement_topic.en: Battery cell and module safety — IEC 62619 certification
requirement_topic.zh: 电池电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電池電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619認證

summary.en: The Seychelles Bureau of Standards (SBS) and SEC require BESS cells and modules to demonstrate compliance with IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications). This is the internationally recognised baseline for BESS product safety assessment. SBS conformity assessment referencing IEC 62619 is required before SEC project licensing.
summary.zh: 塞舌尔标准局（SBS）和SEC要求BESS电芯和模组证明符合IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电池单体和电池组安全要求）。这是BESS产品安全评估的国际公认基准。在SEC项目许可之前，须完成SBS参照IEC 62619的合格评定。
summary.zht: 塞席爾標準局（SBS）和SEC要求BESS電芯和模組證明符合IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電池單體和電池組安全要求）。這是BESS產品安全評估的國際公認基準。在SEC項目許可之前，須完成SBS參照IEC 62619的合格評定。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements — secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications)
IEC 62620:2014 (Secondary cells and batteries — industrial applications — designation system)

summary.en: China uses GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery) as the primary cell safety standard. For stationary storage, GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage) applies. Neither GB 38031 nor GB/T 36276 is accepted by SBS as a substitute for IEC 62619. The technical requirements overlap significantly but the test protocols and certification pathways differ.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）作为主要电芯安全标准。固定储能方面，适用GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）。SBS均不接受GB 38031或GB/T 36276作为IEC 62619的替代标准。技术要求高度重叠，但测试规程和认证路径不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）作為主要電芯安全標準。固定儲能方面，適用GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）。SBS均不接受GB 38031或GB/T 36276作為IEC 62619的替代標準。技術要求高度重疊，但測試規程和認證路徑不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery)
GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: GB 38031 (traction battery) and GB/T 36276 (stationary storage) are not accepted as IEC 62619 equivalents by SBS. Chinese manufacturers must obtain IEC 62619 certification from an internationally accredited certification body (e.g., TÜV, UL, Bureau Veritas, SGS) to satisfy SBS conformity assessment. This requires sending test samples and full technical documentation to an accredited laboratory.
gap.zh: GB 38031（动力电池）和GB/T 36276（固定储能）不被SBS接受为IEC 62619的等效标准。中国制造商须从国际认可认证机构（如TÜV、UL、必维、SGS）获取IEC 62619认证以满足SBS合格评定要求。这需要向认可实验室送样并提交完整技术文件。
gap.zht: GB 38031（動力電池）和GB/T 36276（固定儲能）不被SBS接受為IEC 62619的等效標準。中國製造商須從國際認可認證機構（如TÜV、UL、必維、SGS）獲取IEC 62619認證以滿足SBS合格評定要求。這需要向認可實驗室送樣並提交完整技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SBS conformity assessment prerequisite for SEC licensing
mandatory_status.cn: GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for Seychelles

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619:2022 certification from an internationally accredited body is required for SBS conformity assessment. Chinese GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 certificates are not accepted as substitutes. Manufacturers without existing IEC 62619 certification must budget 6–18 months and significant test fees for this certification pathway before SEC project licensing can proceed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SBS合格评定要求提供来自国际认可机构的IEC 62619:2022认证。中国GB 38031和GB/T 36276证书不被接受为替代。尚无IEC 62619认证的制造商须在SEC项目许可推进之前，为该认证路径预留6–18个月时间及相当的测试费用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SBS合格評定要求提供來自國際認可機構的IEC 62619:2022認證。中國GB 38031和GB/T 36276證書不被接受為替代。尚無IEC 62619認證的製造商須在SEC項目許可推進之前，為該認證路徑預留6–18個月時間及相當的測試費用。

requirement_topic.en: Second-life and refurbished cells — IEC 63056 requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 二次利用与翻新电芯——IEC 63056要求
requirement_topic.zht: 二次利用與翻新電芯——IEC 63056要求

summary.en: Where BESS systems supplied to Seychelles incorporate refurbished, re-used, or second-life lithium cells (e.g., repurposed EV battery modules), SBS requires compliance with IEC 63056:2020 (Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in second-life applications). SEC project licensing requires disclosure of cell origin and applicable safety standard.
summary.zh: 向塞舌尔供应的BESS系统如采用翻新、再利用或二次利用锂电芯（如改用途的电动汽车电池模组），SBS要求符合IEC 63056:2020（含碱性或其他非酸性电解质的二次电池——用于二次利用应用的二次锂电池安全要求）。SEC项目许可要求披露电芯来源及适用安全标准。
summary.zht: 向塞席爾供應的BESS系統如採用翻新、再利用或二次利用鋰電芯（如改用途的電動汽車電池模組），SBS要求符合IEC 63056:2020（含鹼性或其他非酸性電解質的二次電池——用於二次利用應用的二次鋰電池安全要求）。SEC項目許可要求披露電芯來源及適用安全標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 63056:2020 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in second-life applications)

summary.en: China does not have a published national standard directly equivalent to IEC 63056 for second-life battery safety in stationary BESS. Some manufacturers apply internal quality processes referencing GB/T 34015 (retired EV battery echelon utilisation) but this does not constitute IEC 63056 compliance. GB/T 34015 series addresses testing methodology for state-of-health assessment but not the full safety requirement framework of IEC 63056.
summary.zh: 中国尚无针对固定BESS二次利用电池安全的已发布国家标准与IEC 63056直接对应。部分制造商采用参照GB/T 34015（退役电动汽车蓄电池梯次利用）的内部质量流程，但这不构成IEC 63056合规。GB/T 34015系列涉及健康状态评估测试方法，但不涵盖IEC 63056的完整安全要求框架。
summary.zht: 中國尚無針對固定BESS二次利用電池安全的已發布國家標準與IEC 63056直接對應。部分製造商採用參照GB/T 34015（退役電動汽車蓄電池梯次利用）的內部質量流程，但這不構成IEC 63056合規。GB/T 34015系列涉及健康狀態評估測試方法，但不涵蓋IEC 63056的完整安全要求框架。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34015-2017 (Retired EV battery echelon utilisation — residual energy test method)
GB/T 34015.2-2020 (Echelon utilisation — grading requirements and test methods)

gap.en: No Chinese national standard is accepted as equivalent to IEC 63056 for second-life BESS cells. Manufacturers supplying second-life battery systems to Seychelles must obtain IEC 63056 conformity evidence. New cells certified under IEC 62619 avoid this requirement entirely. SEC disclosure obligation applies regardless of whether the cells are new or second-life.
gap.zh: 没有中国国家标准被接受为二次利用BESS电芯IEC 63056的等效标准。向塞舌尔供应二次利用电池系统的制造商须获取IEC 63056合格证明。通过IEC 62619认证的新电芯可完全避免此要求。无论电芯为新品或二次利用，均须履行SEC披露义务。
gap.zht: 沒有中國國家標準被接受為二次利用BESS電芯IEC 63056的等效標準。向塞席爾供應二次利用電池系統的製造商須獲取IEC 63056合格證明。通過IEC 62619認證的新電芯可完全避免此要求。無論電芯為新品或二次利用，均須履行SEC披露義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when second-life cells are used — SBS and SEC requirement
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent mandatory standard; GB/T 34015 is voluntary guidance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese manufacturers supplying second-life battery systems to Seychelles have no accepted domestic equivalent to IEC 63056. IEC 63056 certification from an accredited body is required. The simplest compliance path is to supply new cells with IEC 62619 certification, which eliminates the IEC 63056 requirement entirely. Cell origin must be disclosed to SEC regardless of standard applied.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向塞舌尔供应二次利用电池系统的中国制造商没有被接受的国内IEC 63056等效标准。须获得认可机构的IEC 63056认证。最简单的合规路径是供应具有IEC 62619认证的新电芯，这可完全免除IEC 63056要求。无论适用何种标准，均须向SEC披露电芯来源。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向塞席爾供應二次利用電池系統的中國製造商沒有被接受的國內IEC 63056等效標準。須獲得認可機構的IEC 63056認證。最簡單的合規路徑是供應具有IEC 62619認證的新電芯，這可完全免除IEC 63056要求。無論適用何種標準，均須向SEC披露電芯來源。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical installation safety — SBS and SEC building and electrical code compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装安全——SBS和SEC建筑及电气规程合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝安全——SBS和SEC建築及電氣規程合規

summary.en: Seychelles electrical installations follow IEC 60364 series (Low-voltage electrical installations) as the reference wiring code, consistent with the UK/IEC legacy. BESS electrical installations require compliance with IEC 60364-7 special locations and relevant parts, SBS building standards, and SEC electrical installation approval. All wiring, protection devices, and earthing must be configured for the 240/415 V 50 Hz system.
summary.zh: 塞舌尔电气安装以IEC 60364系列（低压电气安装）为参照布线规程，与英国/IEC传统一致。BESS电气安装须符合IEC 60364-7特殊场所及相关部分、SBS建筑标准和SEC电气安装审批要求。所有布线、保护装置和接地须针对240/415V 50Hz系统配置。
summary.zht: 塞席爾電氣安裝以IEC 60364系列（低壓電氣安裝）為參照佈線規程，與英國/IEC傳統一致。BESS電氣安裝須符合IEC 60364-7特殊場所及相關部分、SBS建築標準和SEC電氣安裝審批要求。所有佈線、保護裝置和接地須針對240/415V 50Hz系統配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62477-1:2022 (Safety requirements for power electronic converter systems)

summary.en: China uses GB 50054-2011 (Code for design of low voltage power distribution) and GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for design of electrochemical energy storage station) as the primary electrical installation standards. These are structured around China's 220/380 V grid. Equipment ratings, circuit breaker specifications, and earthing designs differ from IEC 60364 requirements at 240/415 V.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 50054-2011（低压配电设计规范）和GB/T 51048-2014（电化学储能电站设计规范）作为主要电气安装标准。这些标准围绕中国220/380V电网构建。设备额定值、断路器规格和接地设计与240/415V下的IEC 60364要求不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 50054-2011（低壓配電設計規範）和GB/T 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站設計規範）作為主要電氣安裝標準。這些標準圍繞中國220/380V電網構建。設備額定值、斷路器規格和接地設計與240/415V下的IEC 60364要求不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 50054-2011 (Code for design of low voltage power distribution)
GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for design of electrochemical energy storage station)

gap.en: Chinese electrical installation design documentation referencing GB 50054 and GB/T 51048 at 220/380 V is not accepted by SBS or SEC. Installation designs must be re-engineered for 240/415 V, referencing IEC 60364 series. A licensed local electrical engineer approved by SEC must certify the Seychelles installation. This is an installation-level gap — not resolved by product certification alone.
gap.zh: 参照GB 50054和GB/T 51048在220/380V下编制的中国电气安装设计文件不被SBS或SEC接受。安装设计须参照IEC 60364系列重新按240/415V工程设计。须由SEC认可的持牌本地电气工程师对塞舌尔安装进行认证。这是安装层面的差距——仅凭产品认证无法解决。
gap.zht: 參照GB 50054和GB/T 51048在220/380V下編制的中國電氣安裝設計文件不被SBS或SEC接受。安裝設計須參照IEC 60364系列重新按240/415V工程設計。須由SEC認可的持牌本地電氣工程師對塞席爾安裝進行認證。這是安裝層面的差距——僅憑產品認證無法解決。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SBS building approval and SEC electrical installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 mandatory domestically at 220/380 V; not equivalent for Seychelles

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BESS installation design in Seychelles must reference IEC 60364 series at 240/415 V 50 Hz and be certified by a SEC-approved local licensed electrical engineer. Chinese installation design packages referencing GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 at 220/380 V are not accepted. This requires local engineering engagement — it cannot be resolved by the Chinese manufacturer or exporter acting alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞舌尔BESS安装设计须参照240/415V 50Hz的IEC 60364系列，并由SEC认可的持牌本地电气工程师认证。参照GB 50054/GB/T 51048在220/380V下编制的中国安装设计包不被接受。这需要本地工程介入——中国制造商或出口商无法单独解决。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞席爾BESS安裝設計須參照240/415V 50Hz的IEC 60364系列，並由SEC認可的持牌本地電氣工程師認證。參照GB 50054/GB/T 51048在220/380V下編制的中國安裝設計包不被接受。這需要本地工程介入——中國製造商或出口商無法單獨解決。
